questions.statement: Let V be the real vector space of 2 x 2 matrices with entries in ℝ. Let T : V &rarr; V denote the linear transformation defined by T(B) = AB for all B&nbsp;&isin; V, where <span class="math-tex">\(\rm A=\begin{pmatrix}2&amp;0\\\ 0&amp;1\end{pmatrix}\)</span>. What is the characteristic polynomial of T?&nbsp;
Let T:&nbsp;ℝ<sup>2</sup>&nbsp;&rarr;&nbsp;ℝ<sup>3</sup>&nbsp;be a linear transformation defined by T(x, y) = (x + y, x - y, y). Then Rank of T is
If S = {(1, 1, 0), (2, 1, 3)} is a subset of R<sup>3</sup>&nbsp;then which one of the following vectors of R<sup>3</sup>&nbsp;is not in the linear span of S?
The set {e<sup>2<span style="font-size: 10.5px;">x</span></sup>, e<sup>3x</sup>} for x&nbsp;&euro; ℝ is
